summary: Decent audience recording that some listeners prefer over the Andrew F Sony ECM‑99 pull
review: The lone review focuses on the audio source, noting this audience tape sounds a bit better than another decent fan recording. No comments are made about the performance itself, song selection, or individual musicians.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review that mentions a slight preference for the audio quality; no information on musical performance, so rating is modest with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says it sounds a little better than another decent audience source (Andrew F Sony ECM‑99), implying clear but not exceptional fidelity.
